identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Sheet Music elegance with DAW precision
Emotion First: Every interaction feels like striking a note
Content is King: The Song is the Hero

body.usage: UI Controls, Track Names, Times, Paragraphs

buttons.primary: bg-accent-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-accent-primary_hover shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,215,0,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md

cards.classes: bg-[#0f111a]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

inputs.classes: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-accent-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-primary rounded-lg h-12

multi_track_player.container: bg-[#050508] border-t border-white/10 p-6 fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
multi_track_player.track_lane: flex items-center gap-4 p-3 bg-white/5 rounded-lg mb-2 border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors
multi_track_player.solo_btn: text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded border border-yellow-500/50 text-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-500 hover:text-black transition-colors data-[active=true]:bg-yellow-500 data-[active=true]:text-black
multi_track_player.mute_btn: text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded border border-red-500/50 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-colors data-[active=true]:bg-red-500 data-[active=true]:text-white

layout_strategies.marketing: The Tetris Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetrical, Artistic
layout_strategies.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B) - Data Heavy

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on backgrounds (opacity 0.03)
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows! Use shadow-accent-primary/20 for primary actions
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid white/5 is mandatory for depth in dark mode

motion.micro_interactions: Scale 0.98 on click, Lift -2px on hover

hero.alt: Choir performing on dark stage with spotlights

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic gradients. Use solid dark colors or subtle noise.
Do not center text by default. Left align + grid for tension.
Use Playfair Display for 'Soul' (Headings), Manrope for 'Science' (Controls).
Multi-track player must feel 'tactile' - use shadows/borders to create depth.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
